query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(registeredAt, '%Y-%m') as m, COUNT(*) as c FROM customers WHERE registeredAt IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m ORDER BY m LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user VDyW8BBNx15QJxW.root --database DN8ihETPKNPmGxAqBwYu7X --execute SELECT DATE_FORMAT(registeredAt, '%Y-%m') as m, COUNT(*) as c FROM customers WHERE registeredAt IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m ORDER BY m LIMIT 5;
